limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

search.description: Match against member `first_name`, `last_name`, and `email`. Returns exact (case-insensitive substring) matches only; if no exact match exists, returns similar (fuzzy trigram — typos, prefix-as-you-type) matches instead. Each result's `search_match_type` is `exact` or `similar`. Capped at 200 characters.
